4xx.description:
Possible error codes:
- 2: Folder not found
- 3: Folder limit was exceeded
- 0: Deviation was not found.
- 1: Deviation is already in favourites.
- 4: You have added too many favourites in a short period of time.
- 5: The deviant has blocked you
- 6: Cant fave your own deviation.
- 7: Deviation can not be favourited.

deviationid.description: Id of the Deviation to favourite

folderid.description: Optional :UUID: of the Collection folder to add the favourite into

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The user to list folders for, if omitted the authenticated user is used

parameters.name: calculate_size
parameters.description: The option to include the content count per each collection folder

parameters.name: ext_preload
parameters.description: Include first 5 deviations from the folder

parameters.name: filter_empty_folder
parameters.description: Filters collections with no deviations if true

parameters.name: with_session
parameters.description: session data is not always needed for this endpoint

4xx.description:
Possible error codes:
- 0: Account has been suspended.
- 1: Account is inactive.
- 2: User not found.

get.description: Get the original file download (if allowed)

mature_level.description: The mature level of the submission, (required if is_mature=true)

mature_classification.description: The mature classification of the submission

display_resolution.description: Resize image to. (cannot be bigger than image and is ignored for non images)

galleryids.description: UUIDs of gallery folders to publish this submission to

allow_free_download.description: Offer original file as a free download

add_watermark.description: Add watermark (available only if display_resolution is present)

tags.description: An array of tags describing the submission. Letters, numbers and underscore only.

subject_tags.description: Names of subject tags to attach to the deviation

subject_tag_types.description: Type of the subject tags, one each per subject tag in matching order, required if subject_tags are passed

location_tag.description: Location tag to attach to the deviation

groups.description: Groups to submit the deviation to

group_folders.description: Folders in group to submit the deviation to, one per each group in matching order, required if groups are passed

is_ai_generated.description: Submission is AI generated or not

noai.description: Not authorized for inclusion in third-party AI datasets

post.description:
Update journal. 
            All values left empty, except cover image deviation id, will have the corresponding fields cleared. 
            To keep a field value send the old one. To clear cover image deviation id value - pass `reset_cover_image_deviation_id` param with value `true`

galleryids.description: UUIDs of gallery folders to publish this submission to

mature_level.description: The mature level of the submission, (required if is_mature=true)

mature_classification.description: The mature classification of the submission

post.description: Update literature. Note: null/empty values will have the corresponding fields cleared. To keep a field value send the old one.

galleryids.description: UUIDs of gallery folders to publish this submission to

mature_level.description: The mature level of the submission, (required if is_mature=true)

mature_classification.description: The mature classification of the submission

get.description: Placebo call to confirm your access_token is valid

4xx.description:
Possible error codes:
- 0: Must accept DA submission policy
- 1: Must accept DA terms of service
- 2: Category not found
- 3: Invalid category or not allowed
- 4: Invalid license configuration
- 5: Invalid display_resolution configuration
- 6: Publication failed
- 7: Deviation not found
- 8: Preview image required
- 9: Deviation already published

post.description: Publish a Sta.sh item to deviantART

mature_level.description: The mature level of the submission, (required if is_mature=true)

mature_classification.description: The mature classification of the submission

display_resolution.description: Resize image to. (cannot be bigger than image and is ignored for non images)

galleryids.description: UUIDs of gallery folders to publish this submission to

allow_free_download.description: Offer original file as a free download

add_watermark.description: Add watermark (available only if display_resolution is present)

tags.description: An array of tags describing the submission. Letters, numbers and underscore only.

subject_tags.description: Names of subject tags to attach to the deviation

subject_tag_types.description: Type of the subject tags, one each per subject tag in matching order, required if subject_tags are passed

location_tag.description: Location tag to attach to the deviation

groups.description: Groups to submit the deviation to

group_folders.description: Folders in group to submit the deviation to, one per each group in matching order, required if groups are passed

is_ai_generated.description: Submission is AI generated or not

noai.description: Not authorized for inclusion in third-party AI datasets

itemid.description: The id of the stash item to publish

4xx.description:
Possible error codes:
- 1: Client error, e.g. updating non-existing submission
- 2: Validation error, e.g. upload is too large

post.description: Submit files to Sta.sh or modify existing files

artist_comments.description: Additional information about the submission provided by the author

tags.description: An array of tags describing the submission. Letters, numbers and underscore only.

original_url.description: A link to the original, in case the artwork has already been posted elsewhere. This field can be restricted with a whitelist by editing your deviantART app.

is_dirty.description:
Is the submission being worked on currently. 
                    You can use this flag to warn users that the item is being edited and may change if they reload.
                    Note this does NOT provide any type of locking.

itemid.description:
The id of an existing Sta.sh submission.
                    This can be used to overwrite files and /metadata of existing submissions.
                    If you make a new API call containing files, the files that were previously associated with the artwork will be replaced by the new ones.

stack.description: The name of the stack to create and place the new submission in. Applies to new submissions only. (Ignored if :stackid: is set)

stackid.description: The id of the stack to create and place the new submission in. Applies to new submissions only.

noai.description: Not authorized for inclusion in third-party AI datasets

is_ai_generated.description: Submission is AI generated or not
